metadata.title: Ygente - Growth Network for the Hispanic Community
metadata.description: The first coselling platform for Latinos. Earn by influencing, even indirectly. Powered by AI-driven influence accounting.

homepage.heroTitle: Join the movement that will transform Hispanic commerce
homepage.heroSubtitle: We're building the first growth network by and for our community. Founders will have exclusive access and lifetime benefits.
homepage.trustSubtitle: Early members will have unique advantages
homepage.trust1Description: Be part of the exclusive group shaping the future of Hispanic commerce.
homepage.trust2Description: Preferential commissions and permanent access to Pro features.
homepage.trust3Description: Your opinion matters. Founders directly influence development.
homepage.trust4Description: Permanent recognition as a pioneer of the Ygente community.
homepage.categoriesSubtitle: Products curated for the Latino lifestyle
homepage.howItWorksSubtitle: Shopping has never been so personal
homepage.step1Description: Connect with people from your community who share your tastes and interests.
homepage.step2Description: Explore the products they actually use and recommend from the heart.
homepage.step3Description: Know that every recommendation comes from a real person, not a paid ad.
homepage.step4Description: Tell your family and friends about your favorite discoveries.
homepage.communitySubtitle: Together we'll build the largest Hispanic commerce community
homepage.testimonial1Quote: Finally I can buy products my abuelita would approve of, recommended by people like me.
homepage.testimonial2Quote: It's like shopping with my favorite cousin, but from my phone.
homepage.testimonial3Quote: I found beauty products that actually work for my Latina skin type.
homepage.ctaSubtitle: Be among the first to transform how our community buys and sells.

nosotrosPage.title: About Us
nosotrosPage.heroTitle: From our people, for our people
nosotrosPage.heroSubtitle: Our mission is to empower the Hispanic community through authentic social commerce
nosotrosPage.manifestoText1: We believe every Hispanic has the power to influence their community's purchasing decisions. You don't need millions of followers - you need trust.
nosotrosPage.manifestoText2: Ygente was born from a simple observation: the best product recommendations come from people we know and trust. Your aunt who always knows where to find the best deals. Your cousin who's the tech expert. Your neighbor with the best taste in beauty.
nosotrosPage.manifestoText3: We're building the platform that makes it possible for these authentic voices to monetize their natural influence, while brands access the Hispanic market genuinely.
nosotrosPage.value1Description: We prioritize real relationships over vanity metrics
nosotrosPage.value3Description: The foundation of everything we do
nosotrosPage.value4Description: We democratize access to extra income

circuloFundadorPage.title: Founding Circle
circuloFundadorPage.heroSubtitle: Join an exclusive group of pioneers who will define coselling in the Hispanic community
circuloFundadorPage.whatIsDescription: The Founding Circle is our exclusive program for the first 50 ambassadors and 25 brands that join Ygente before the official launch. As a founder, you'll have lifetime benefits and be part of the decisions that shape the platform.
circuloFundadorPage.applicationDescription: Complete the form below and our team will review your application within 48 hours.
circuloFundadorPage.formWhy: Why do you want to be part of the Founding Circle?
circuloFundadorPage.formSuccess: Application received! We'll contact you soon.

contactoPage.title: Contact

legalPage.placeholder: This section will be completed soon with full legal documentation. Please contact legal@ygente.com for any inquiries.

whatIsYgente.heading: We don't build marketplaces. We cultivate local economies.
whatIsYgente.body1: Most platforms connect buyers and sellers. Ygente connects communities.
whatIsYgente.body2: Every purchase strengthens local businesses, creators, ambassadors, and the communities where those purchases happen.
whatIsYgente.body3: We're building a founder-led Hispanic growth network.

commonwealth.title: Ygente
commonwealth.tagline: We don't build marketplaces. We cultivate local economies.
commonwealth.lede: Ygente is a founder-led growth network for Hispanic commerce: a platform where brands, creators, ambassadors, customers, and regional partners grow together through clear Ygente agreements.
commonwealth.exploreSubtitle: Six ways to understand what we're building—and why.
commonwealth.visionDesc: The story of why Ygente exists, and the future we're building together.
commonwealth.worksDesc: How trusted recommendations, local relationships, and measurable commerce help the network grow.
commonwealth.constitutionDesc: The operating principles that guide our founders, executives, team, and partners.
commonwealth.governanceDesc: How founders and executives set direction while regional partners help local markets grow.
commonwealth.territoriesDesc: A practical market structure for local growth, from countries and states to cities and neighborhoods.
commonwealth.stewardDesc: Regional partners help Ygente develop local markets through standard Ygente agreements.
commonwealth.principlesSubtitle: The standards that guide how Ygente grows.
commonwealth.p1Desc: Ygente is led by founders and executives responsible for the platform, the brand, and the direction of the network.
commonwealth.p2Desc: Value should circulate back into the communities that create it.
commonwealth.p3Desc: Regional insight matters, while shared standards keep the network consistent and trustworthy.
commonwealth.p5Desc: Ygente grows by helping customers, creators, ambassadors, and brands succeed together.
commonwealth.p6Desc: Every decision weighs the generations who will inherit it.
commonwealth.ctaSubtitle: Be among the first to help build the growth network our communities deserve.

visionPage.title: Our Vision
visionPage.heroSubtitle: A founder-led network built around what commerce could do for our people.
visionPage.p1: For decades, Hispanic communities have generated hundreds of billions of dollars in purchasing power.
visionPage.p2: Yet much of that wealth leaves our neighborhoods. Businesses struggle to grow. Creators struggle to monetize. Communities struggle to retain the economic value they create.
visionPage.p3: Technology has connected billions of people. But it has rarely helped local relationships turn into measurable growth and durable opportunity.
visionPage.beliefsTitle: We believe there is another way.
visionPage.belief1: Every purchase should strengthen the neighborhood where it happens.
visionPage.belief2: Every entrepreneur should have local advocates.
visionPage.belief3: Every creator should help build lasting prosperity.
visionPage.closing: We don't build marketplaces. We cultivate local economies through Ygente: trusted recommendations, founder-led execution, and practical agreements that let the network grow.

commonwealthWorks.title: How Ygente Works
commonwealthWorks.heroTitle: Prosperity that moves in circles, not pipelines.
commonwealthWorks.heroSubtitle: In a stronger growth network, every transaction can support buyers, brands, creators, ambassadors, and local markets at once.
commonwealthWorks.circleSubtitle: Every act of commerce is designed to benefit the whole circle—not a single platform at the end of a pipeline.
commonwealthWorks.fivecsSubtitle: Community-powered growth for the AI economy. Each C feeds the next.
commonwealthWorks.mechTitle: How value grows through the network
commonwealthWorks.mechSubtitle: Three mechanisms help Ygente turn trusted relationships into measurable commerce.
commonwealthWorks.mech1Desc: Reputation is earned through honest recommendations, reliable activity, customer feedback, and consistent results.
commonwealthWorks.mech2Desc: Ygente can support priority markets with campaigns, training, local events, creator sponsorships, and brand partnerships.
commonwealthWorks.mech3Desc: Ambassadors, creators, brands, and regional partners participate through clear contracts, platform terms, licenses, and commercial policies.
commonwealthWorks.ctaTitle: This is Ygente's model for trusted growth.

governancePage.title: Leadership
governancePage.heroSubtitle: Ygente is led by founders and executives who set direction, protect the brand, and equip local markets to grow.
governancePage.subsidiarityBody: The executive team owns Ygente's strategy, platform standards, contracts, brand protection, and major partnerships. Regional partners and community operators contribute local knowledge, relationships, and execution under Ygente agreements.
governancePage.representationSubtitle: Market knowledge moves upward. Ygente support, tools, and standards move outward.
governancePage.councilBody: The executive team leads Ygente as a corporation. It is responsible for strategy, operations, brand standards, partnerships, platform policies, and long-term growth.
governancePage.council4: Maintain partner standards and resolve disputes
governancePage.ctaTitle: Leadership turns vision into operating discipline.

territoriesPage.title: Markets
territoriesPage.heroTitle: A growth network across many markets.
territoriesPage.heroSubtitle: One Ygente, many markets. We scale by combining shared standards with local relationships.
territoriesPage.whatBody: A market is a practical growth area for Ygente. It may be a country, state, region, city, neighborhood, ZIP code, or diaspora community. Markets help Ygente organize ambassadors, creators, brands, campaigns, and regional partner opportunities.
territoriesPage.treeSubtitle: Each market fits into a larger operating structure so Ygente can support local growth with consistent standards.
territoriesPage.principleTitle: Each market is supported by Ygente standards.
territoriesPage.principleBody: Ygente remains a traditional corporation led by founders and executives. Regional partners may help develop markets through approved roles, contracts, licenses, training, and performance expectations.
territoriesPage.ctaTitle: Priority markets need strong regional partners.

stewardPage.title: Become a Regional Partner
stewardPage.heroTitle: Help Ygente grow in your market.
stewardPage.heroSubtitle: A regional partner helps develop local relationships, campaigns, ambassadors, creators, and brands under Ygente agreements.
stewardPage.whatBody: A regional partner is an approved Ygente operator for a defined market opportunity. The role is contractual, performance-based, and accountable to Ygente standards, brand guidelines, and executive direction.
stewardPage.multiplyTitle: Great partners create repeatable local growth.
stewardPage.multiplyBody: Regional partners open doors, develop ambassadors and creators, support brands, strengthen trust, preserve culture, and help Ygente execute locally while operating within Ygente agreements and standards.
stewardPage.pledgeSubtitle: The standards every regional partner accepts.
stewardPage.pledge1: I will strengthen trust before seeking profit.
stewardPage.pledge2: I will help my market grow responsibly.
stewardPage.pledge3: I will serve customers, creators, ambassadors, and brands with integrity.
stewardPage.pledge4: I will protect the Ygente brand and platform.
stewardPage.pledge6: I will develop future market leaders.
stewardPage.pledge7: I will honor our culture while embracing innovation.
stewardPage.pledge8: I will measure success by the prosperity created for others.
stewardPage.pledge9: I will remember that every transaction represents a human relationship.
stewardPage.pledge10: I will help build Ygente for future generations.
stewardPage.pledgeClosing: For our people. By our people. Together. Forever.
stewardPage.ctaTitle: Ready to help your market grow?
stewardPage.ctaSubtitle: Founding regional partners are chosen from the first generation of members. Apply to the Founding Circle to begin.

constitutionPage.title: Ygente Principles
constitutionPage.heroSubtitle: De Nuestra Gente. Para Nuestra Gente.
constitutionPage.heroEpigraph: Ygente grows when our communities grow.
constitutionPage.intro: These principles guide how Ygente's founders, executives, team members, ambassadors, creators, brands, and regional partners build the network. They are not a legal charter; participation is governed by Ygente's contracts, licenses, platform terms, and policies.
constitutionPage.ctaTitle: Principles matter when they shape how we operate.

creadoresPage.title: Creators
creadoresPage.heroTitle: Monetize your voice, strengthen your community
creadoresPage.heroSubtitle: Turn your audience into lasting prosperity. Earn on the outcomes you influence—even indirectly—with products that genuinely fit your content.
creadoresPage.step1Description: Tell us about your audience and the content you make.
creadoresPage.step2Description: Choose products that genuinely align with your voice and community.
creadoresPage.step3Description: Feature them naturally across your channels with your unique link.
creadoresPage.step4Description: Get paid for every sale you influence, even if you're not the last click.
creadoresPage.benefit3: AI Curator matched to your audience
